content.query:
SELECT 
[_adset_id] as AdsetID
,[_campaign_id] as CampaignID
,[_account_id] as AccountID
,[_adset_name] as AdsetName
,[_bid_strategy] as BidStrategy
,[_optimization_goal] as OptimizationGoal
,[_optimization_sub_event] as OptimizationSubEvent
,[_configured_status] as ConfiguredStatus
,[_status] as Status
,[_effective_status] as EffectiveStatus
,[_created_time] as CreatedTime
,[_start_time] as StartTime
,[_updated_time] as UpdatedTime
,[_end_time] as EndTime
,[_billing_event] as BillingEvent
,[_budget_remaining] as BudgetRemaining
,[_daily_budget] as DailyBudget
,[_lifetime_budget] as LifetimeBudget
,[_recurring_budget_semantics] as RecurringBudgetSemantics
,[_destination_type] as DestinationType
,[_is_dynamic_creative] as IsDynamicCreative
,[_lal_percentage] as LookAlikePercentage
,[_age_min] as AgeMin
,[_age_max] as AgeMax
,[_genders] as Genders
,[_geo_countries] as GeoCountries
,[_pacing_type] as PacingType
,[_device] as Device
,[_adset_schedule] as AdsetSchedule
,[_attribution_spec] as AttributionSpec
,[_behaviors_full_details] as BehaviorsFullDetails
,[_behaviors_full_details_string] as BehaviorsFullDetailsString
,[_behaviors_ids] as BehaviorsIDs
,[_behaviors_ids_string] as BehaviorsIDsString
,[_behaviors_names] as BehaviorsNames
,[_behaviors_names_string] as BehaviorsNamesString
,[_bid_amount] as BidAmount
,[_bid_info__actions] as BidInfoActions
,[_bid_info__clicks] as BidInfoClicks
,[_bid_info__reach] as BidInfoReach
,[_custom_audience_full_details] as CustomAudienceFullDetails
,[_custom_audience_full_details_string] as CustomAudienceFullDetailsString
,[_custom_audience_ids] as CustomAudienceIDs
,[_custom_audience_ids_string] as CustomAudienceIDsString
,[_custom_audience_names] as CustomAudienceNames
,[_custom_audience_names_string] as CustomAudienceNamesString
,[_excluded_custom_audiences_full_details] as ExcludedCustomAudiencesFullDetails
,[_excluded_custom_audiences_full_details_string] as ExcludedCustomAudiencesFullDetailsString
,[_excluded_custom_audiences_ids] as ExcludedCustomAudiencesIDs
,[_excluded_custom_audiences_ids_string] as ExcludedCustomAudiencesIDsString
,[_excluded_custom_audiences_names] as ExcludedCustomAudiencesNames
,[_excluded_custom_audiences_names_string] as ExcludedCustomAudiencesNamesString
,[_excluded_custom_audiences_string] as ExcludedCustomAudiencesString
,[_excluded_geo_countries] as ExcludedGeoCountries
,[_frequency_control_specs] as FrequencyControlSpecs
,[_instagram_actor_id] as InstagramActorID
,[_interests_full_details] as InterestsFullDetails
,[_interests_full_details_string] as InterestsFullDetailsString
,[_interests_ids] as InterestsIds
,[_interests_ids_string] as InterestsIdsString
,[_interests_names] as InterestsNames
,[_interests_names_string] as InterestsNamesString
,[_lal_percentage_string] as LookAlikePercentageString
,[_lifetime_imps] as LifetimeImps
,[_promoted_object__application_id] as PromotedObjectApplicationID
,[_promoted_object__custom_event_type] as PromotedObjectCustomEventType
,[_promoted_object__object_store_url] as PromotedObjectObjectStoreUrl
,[_promoted_object__offer_id] as PromotedObjectOfferID
,[_promoted_object__page_id] as PromotedObjectPageID
,[_promoted_object__pixel_id] as PromotedObjectPixelID
,[_promoted_object__pixel_rule] as PromotedObjectPixelRule
,[_seed_audience] as SeedAudience
,[_source_adset_id] as SourceAdsetID
,[_use_new_app_click] as UseNewAppClick
,[_user_os] as UserOS
,[_user_os_string] as UserOSString
 FROM [RIVERY].[fb_ads_adsets]
